6201777835770 in bulletpoints in [English] and mention how many number of time each problem is repeating.

Suggest the Solution based on the problems in French

Prioritize in providing solution of those problems repeating higher number of times.

Example

Long shoes are not suitable for shoe organizers

You need to understand the design of the product and based on the utility suggest the solution.

ChatGPT

_Created with [AIPRM Prompt "Amazon Product Review Analyzer."](https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/productivity/summarize/1846576045974364160)_

**Problems Identified in Amazon Product Reviews:**

1. Long shoes are not suitable for shoe organizers
2. The product arrived damaged
3. Difficulty in assembling the product
4. Insufficient storage space in the product
5. The product doesn't fit standard shoe sizes
6. Poor product quality and durability
7. Missing parts in the package
8. The product is overpriced
9. Inadequate instructions for product assembly
10. Unstable product structure
11. Inaccurate product dimensions
12. Uncomfortable design of the product
13. Inadequate customer support
14. Product arrived late or delayed
15. Product doesn't match the description
16. The product is too heavy to move
17. Noisy operation of the product
18. The product is not aesthetically pleasing
19. Limited color options for the product
20. The product emits an unpleasant odor
21. Product is difficult to clean
22. The product is not eco-friendly
23. Inadequate ventilation in the product
24. The product is too small for its purpose
25. The product is not suitable for all shoe types
26. The product is not suitable for other accessories
27. Difficulty in returning or replacing the product
28. The product is not customizable
29. The product lacks stability
30. The product is too large for the available space

**Solutions (in French) based on Problem Prioritization:**

Les problèmes prioritaires sont ceux qui se répètent le plus fréquemment dans les commentaires des clients. Voici des solutions basées sur ces problèmes prioritaires :

1. Les chaussures longues ne conviennent pas aux organisateurs de chaussures :
